data.title: Kanojo no Tomodachi
data.synopsis:
Takeru Hidaka is an ambitious high school student aiming for medical school. He has just started dating his first girlfriend, Kaori Koga, and to everyone else, their relationship seems perfectly harmonious.

However, that peace is threatened when Kaori's best friend, Tomoko Yoshioka, begins to flirt with and seduce Takeru. Caught between loyalty to his girlfriend and Tomoko's advances, Takeru falls into a double life and a complicated affair. Now, he must navigate a web of lies that puts both his academic future and his emotional connections at risk, all while the constant threat of his secret being exposed looms over him.

(Source: MAL News)

title_synonyms: Zhandou Wang: Jufeng Zhan Hun 7th Season
战斗王之飓风战魂 第7季
data.synopsis:
Set on the fictional continent of Lotri, Infinity Nado 7 presents a vibrant fantasy world where conflicts and alliances among the Thunder Dragon Tribe, Sapiens Tribe, and Blazing Flame Tribe shape the fate of the land. As dark forces begin to stir, the tribes must learn to stand together, conveying the core message of unity and shared destiny.

At the border marketplace between the three tribes, genius Nado mechanic Kareisha sells his self-made replicas of the Sacred Nado. However, Sergio, a young warrior from the Blazing Flame Tribe, accuses him of deception, and their dispute quickly escalates into a Nado battle. Suddenly, Sergio’s older brother Serlo appears, revealing that Sergio is hiding an important secret. Forced to escape the chaos together, Kareisha soon realizes that Sergio seems unusually familiar with the Sacred Nado. Meanwhile, the mysterious girl Lacey watches the situation unfold from the shadows, hinting that the crisis surrounding the Sacred Nado is about to begin once again.

(Source: Official YouTube Channel)

titles.title: The Credits Roll Into the Sea
海が走るエンドロール

data.title: Umi ga Hashiru End Roll
data.title_japanese: 海が走るエンドロール
title_synonyms: The Credits Roll Into the Sea
data.synopsis:
Umiko Chino, a 65-year-old widow, has no noteworthy hobbies to speak of. When her VCR stops working, Umiko decides to pay a visit to the cinema, like she once did with her husband on their first date. However, instead of focusing on the movie, her gaze is fixed upon the audience—and on one young-looking person in particular.

After the credits roll, the mysterious person introduces themself to Umiko as Kai Hamauchi—a male college student majoring in film. Umiko asks him to fix her VCR, and Kai obliges. Yet, before Kai leaves, he asks Umiko a question that changes the course of her life: would she like to make a movie with him?

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
